variant_name: 高令宁 — 江南和离后
trigger: 和离后江南宅院生活，陆姝仪道歉（scene_013）和三年后雪夜纠缠（scene_014）

appearance_delta.face: 更显成熟从容，眼神从怨恨转为释怀
appearance_delta.body: 苗条修长，气质优雅稳重
appearance_delta.hair: 简约优雅发髻，略带江南闲适
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 母亲的温柔守护与重获自由的独立气场

costume_override.outfit: 江南风格简约华贵丝绸汉服

visual_reference: elegant Chinese noblewoman in Jiangnan courtyard wearing simplified Tang-Song Hanfu, sharp phoenix eyes softened by relief and strength, elegant oval face, long black hair in loose sophisticated bun, fair skin, proud yet peaceful motherly expression, cinematic lighting, 8k
emotional_tone: 释怀独立，面对追逐时的坚定
